description: Correct the vignetting in the fluorescence microscopy image '~/Fiji_Data/raw/illumination_test/test_image.tif' using a pseudo-flat-field correction method (Gaussian blur sigma=50, 32-bit division). Export the corrected image to '~/Fiji_Data/results/flatfield/corrected_image.tif' and the flat-field reference to '~/Fiji_Data/results/flatfield/flatfield_reference.tif'. Document the mean intensity comparison of the center versus corners before and after correction in '~/Fiji_Data/results/flatfield/uniformity_report.csv' and provide a summary of the uniformity improvement in '~/Fiji_Data/results/flatfield/correction_summary.txt'.
